lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਫੇਰੁ ਨ ਪਵੈ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai fer na pavai janam maran dukh jaae |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, you shall not have to go through the cycle of reincarnation again; the pains of birth and death will be taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਭ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: poorai sabad sabh sojhee hoee har naamai rahai samaae |1|
lines.english: Through the Perfect Word of the Shabad, all understanding is obtained; remain absorbed in the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere satigur siau chit laae |
lines.english: O my mind, focus your consciousness on the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦ ਨਵਤਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: niramal naam sad navatano aap vasai man aae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Immaculate Naam itself, ever-fresh, comes to abide within the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਜਿਉ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਰਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo raakhahu apunee saranaaee jiau raakheh tiau rahanaa |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, please protect and preserve me in Your Sanctuary. As You keep me, so do I remain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag naau paaeeai guramat sabad suhaaee |
lines.english: By great good fortune, the Name is obtained. Following the Guru's Teachings, through the Shabad, you shall be exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad jeevat marai guramukh bhavajal taranaa |2|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Gurmukh remains dead while yet alive, and swims across the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਭਾਵੈ ਬੰਧਨਿ ਬੰਧਿ ਭਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa manamukh sabad na bhaavai bandhan bandh bhavaaeaa |
lines.english: Some are self-willed manmukhs; they do not love the Word of the Shabad. Bound in chains, they wander lost in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape man vasiaa prabh karataa sahaje rahiaa samaaee |3|
lines.english: God, the Creator Himself, dwells within the mind; remain absorbed in the state of intuitive balance. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh fir fir aavai birathaa janam gavaaeaa |4|
lines.english: Through 8.4 million lifetimes, they wander over and over again; they waste away their lives in vain. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਦ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਤੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: anadin gun gaaveh sad niramal sahaje naam samaate |5|
lines.english: Night and day, they constantly sing the Glories of the Immaculate Lord; with intuitive ease, they are absorbed into the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa man aanand hai sachai sabad rang raate |
lines.english: In the minds of the devotees there is bliss; they are attuned to the Love of the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਸਭ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh amrit baanee boleh sabh aatam raam pachhaanee |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs speak the Ambrosial Bani; they recognize the Lord, the Supreme Soul in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਏਕੁ ਅਰਾਧਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: eko sevan ek araadheh guramukh akath kahaanee |6|
lines.english: They serve the One; they worship and adore the One. The Gurmukhs speak the Unspoken Speech. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib seveeai guramukh vasai man aae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs serve their True Lord and Master, who comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਚ ਸਿਉ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sadaa rang raate sach siau apunee kirapaa kare milaae |7|
lines.english: They are forever attuned to the Love of the True One, who bestows His Mercy and unites them with Himself. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਇਕਨਾ ਸੁਤਿਆ ਦੇਇ ਜਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae aape ikanaa sutiaa dee jagaae |
lines.english: He Himself does, and He Himself causes others to do; He wakes some from their sleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੮॥੭॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: aape mel milaaeidaa naanak sabad samaae |8|7|24|
lines.english: He Himself unites us in Union; Nanak is absorbed in the Shabad. ||8||7||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਭਏ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਸਰੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai man niramalaa bhe pavit sareer |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, the mind becomes immaculate, and the body becomes pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man aanand sadaa sukh paaeaa bhettiaa gahir ganbheer |
lines.english: The mind obtains bliss and eternal peace, meeting with the Deep and Profound Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਬੈਸਣਾ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sachee sangat baisanaa sach naam man dheer |1|
lines.english: Sitting in the Sangat, the True Congregation, the mind is comforted and consoled by the True Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਨਿਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: man re satigur sev nisang |
lines.english: O mind, serve the True Guru without hesitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਮੈਲੁ ਪਤੰਗੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai har man vasai lagai na mail patang |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, the Lord abides within the mind, and no trace of filth shall attach itself to you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਤਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad pat aoopajai sache sachaa naau |
lines.english: From the True Word of the Shabad comes honor. True is the Name of the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinee haumai maar pachhaaniaa hau tin balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who conquer their ego and recognize the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਪੈਨਣਾ ਸਚੇ ਹੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach khaanaa sach painanaa sache hee vich vaas |
lines.english: Those who take the Truth as their food and the Truth as their clothing, have their home in the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਤਿਨ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਕਤਹੂ ਥਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: manamukh sach na jaananee tin tthaur na katahoo thaau |2|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not know the True One; they find no shelter, and no place of rest anywhere. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sachaa saalaahanaa sachai sabad nivaas |
lines.english: They constantly praise the True One, and in the True Word of the Shabad they have their dwelling.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabh aatam raam pachhaaniaa guramatee nij ghar vaas |3|
lines.english: They recognize the Lord, the Supreme Soul in all, and through the Guru's Teachings they dwell in the home of their own inner self. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵੇਖਣੁ ਸਚੁ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਚਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach vekhan sach bolanaa tan man sachaa hoe |
lines.english: They see the Truth, and they speak the Truth; their bodies and minds are True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਸਾਖੀ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੇ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachee saakhee upades sach sache sachee soe |
lines.english: True are their teachings, and True are their instructions; True are the reputations of the true ones.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿੰਨੀ ਸਚੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਸੇ ਦੁਖੀਏ ਚਲੇ ਰੋਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jinee sach visaariaa se dukhee chale roe |4|
lines.english: Those who have forgotten the True One are miserable-they depart weeping and wailing. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਸੇ ਕਿਤੁ ਆਏ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur jinee na sevio se kit aae sansaar |
lines.english: Those who have not served the True Guru-why did they even bother to come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: birathaa janam gavaaeaa mar jameh vaaro vaar |5|
lines.english: They waste their lives uselessly; they die and are reincarnated over and over again. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਦਰਿ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਕੂਕ ਨ ਸੁਣੈ ਪੂਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jam dar badhe maareeeh kook na sunai pookaar |
lines.english: They are bound and gagged and beaten at Death's door, but no one hears their shrieks and cries.
